paragraphs: Hi, I'm Guangxin. M.Sc. Computer Science (Visual Computing track) at the University of Stuttgart; B.Eng. from CUHK-Shenzhen.

I work on real-time graphics: rendering pipelines, non-photorealistic shading, neural scene representations. Currently a HiWi at VISUS, hacking on MPEG video streaming for the Amulet project (NVIDIA Falcor + NVENC + Vulkan Video), alongside a research project on 2D Gaussian Splatting for narrow-baseline forward-facing rendering.
